name: Amihan 2T
shortDesc: 2-stroke motorcycle oil for everyday commuters. Reliable engine protection in a compact size.
description: The Bagani Amihan 2T is a reliable 2-stroke motorcycle oil formulated for everyday commuters. Designed for the demands of Philippine roads, it provides consistent engine protection in a convenient 200ml size.

features.title: Compact Size
features.desc: Convenient 200ml packaging perfect for single oil changes and on-the-go riders.

features.title: API TA Certified
features.desc: Meets API TA standards for reliable 2-stroke engine protection.

features.title: Clean Burn
